chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B.A. No.2557 of 2025 (Kashif vs. The State) Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah For hearing of bail application Date of hearing & order 01.12.2025 O R D E R ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant is seeking post arrest bail in a case bearing Crime No.96/2025, u/s 9(i) 3(c) CNC Act, registered at Police Station, Saudabad, Karachi by means of this application. 2. Applicant was arrested on 22.04.2025 by a police team headed by Sub-Inspector Jasim of Police Station Saudabad, Karachi, District Korangi from the Intrance Gate of Millat Garden near Radus Ground Malir, Karachi, and from him allegedly 1055 grams of charas was recovered. Hence, this FIR. 3. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that applicant is confined in jail for last seven months, yet even the charge has not been framed. He further submits that applicant is first offender and that compliance of Section 17 Sindh Control of Narcotics Substances Act, 2024 is missing in that the video recording of alleged recovery has not been recorded. 4. Learned Additional PG Sindh has opposed the bail but has not been able to satisfactorily rebut the aforesaid arguments raised in defence. Therefore, we allow this application and grant bail to the applicant on the same grounds subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/ (Rupees one lac) with P.R. bond in the like amount to be executed to the satisfaction of the trial Court. 5. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial.
Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/PA.
